articles.title: It was great to catch up last week with our SkyKelpie Scholarship recipient, Luke O’Sullivan. Big thanks to Hover UAV for showing Luke the D
articles.snippet: It was great to catch up last week with our SkyKelpie Scholarship recipient, Luke O’Sullivan. Big thanks to Hover UAV for showing Luke the DJI Dock and Remote Operations Centre. Our goal is to equip Luke with a Dock on his home property that he’ll be able to control from his office. From there, we have many other ideas and plans! We’re exploring some promising funding opportunities to make Luke’s dream a reality, but if you’d like to help out, please get in touch. Ability Agriculture Foundation Jackie Dujmovic Mark Dujmovic Phillip Grieve Belinda McLeod Spinal Life Australia

articles.title: Last week was one of those weeks that really reminds you how far this industry has come. In just five days, our team deployed seven DJI Dock
articles.snippet: Last week was one of those weeks that really reminds you how far this industry has come. In just five days, our team deployed seven DJI Dock systems across three different states, supporting ongoing renewable energy and infrastructure projects that rely on consistent, high-quality geospatial data. Deployments like this go far beyond simply placing hardware in the field. Each site requires careful planning, site surveys, connectivity setup, system testing, and power integration to ensure the docks are ready to operate safely and reliably from day one. Once operational, these systems enable automated daily aerial data collection, providing construction teams with a consistent, real-time view of progress across large and rapidly evolving job sites. Many of these deployments are also fully off-grid, which adds another layer of complexity. That’s where strong partnerships make all the difference. A big thank you to our partners at Aerial Prospex , who provide the off-grid power solutions th

articles.title: The response this week to our DJI Dock 3 installation on our Team UAV truck has been incredible. Thank you to everyone who has reached out,
articles.snippet: The response this week to our DJI Dock 3 installation on our Team UAV truck has been incredible. Thank you to everyone who has reached out, commented and shared the posts. A significant amount of work went on behind the scenes to get this system integrated and fully operational. From vehicle setup through to testing and first deployment within controlled airspace at Barton Aerodrome, the team completed the integration in a live operational environment, with the aircraft remotely piloted from Glasgow. We are proud of the standard being set by our team and look forward to continuing to develop and expand this capability. If you would like more information or want to arrange a demonstration to see how this could support your operations, please get in touch. articles.title: “DJI Dock 3: When Winter Freezes, Your Drone Ops Don’t” “Snow, ice, sub‑zero wind… and your drone system is still online.” DJI Dock 3 is bui
articles.snippet: “DJI Dock 3: When Winter Freezes, Your Drone Ops Don’t” “Snow, ice, sub‑zero wind… and your drone system is still online.” DJI Dock 3 is built to keep autonomous drone operations running in harsh environments, not just sunny days. In this alpine deployment, the dock sits directly in the cold – its housing covered in frost – yet it continues to shelter, charge and manage the drone for fully automated missions. That makes it ideal for: Mountain and valley infrastructure inspection (power lines, towers, cable cars, roads). Remote energy sites and pipelines in cold or hard‑to‑reach terrain. Safety and environmental monitoring above snow‑covered slopes and valleys. With DJI Dock 3, teams can launch drones on‑demand or on schedule without sending staff into the elements, getting live video and data from the control room instead. XDRON helps organisations design, deploy and support DJI Dock 3 solutions for rugged, all‑weather operations. hashtag #DJIDock3 hashtag #DroneInABox hashtag #Autonom

articles.title: INTRODUCING DUAL DOCK DEPLOYMENT By Michael Lever, Technical Director 24/7 Drone Force has deployed our latest semi-autonomous mobile survei
articles.snippet: INTRODUCING DUAL DOCK DEPLOYMENT By Michael Lever, Technical Director 24/7 Drone Force has deployed our latest semi-autonomous mobile surveillance solution - now fitted with a dual DJI Dock 3 configuration, each housing a DJI Matrice 4TD aircraft. This marks a significant operational advancement in drone-enabled security capability in South Africa. ➡️ The DJI Dock 3 platform delivers: - 10-second rapid launch capability - IP56-rated environmental protection - Operational tolerance from –30°C to 50°C These specifications make it exceptionally well-suited to South Africa’s diverse and often harsh environmental conditions. ➡️ The Matrice 4TD further extends operational capacity with: - Up to 54 minutes of airtime per flight - IP55 dust and water resistance - Multi-sensor payload including: Wide-angle camera ~ Medium telephoto ~ Telephoto zoom ~ Infrared thermal imaging ~ Laser rangefinder ~ NIR auxiliary lighting for night operations 🟡 Operational Advantage: Near-Continuous Aerial Presen

articles.title: Earlier this week we announced the installation of DJI Dock 3 onto our Team UAV Wildtrak truck. Here are the highlights from the first opera
articles.snippet: Earlier this week we announced the installation of DJI Dock 3 onto our Team UAV Wildtrak truck. Here are the highlights from the first operational flight, which took place at Manchester Barton Aerodrome and was remotely piloted from Glasgow! The system is fully integrated onto the vehicle, allowing us to position, deploy and manage autonomous flights directly within live environments. Missions can be scheduled, triggered as required and operated remotely, with full oversight. This is practical deployment, not concept. It gives us greater flexibility across infrastructure, utilities and complex operational sites, while maintaining consistent and repeatable data capture. The Team UAV truck with Dock 3 is now operational. If you would like more information or a live demonstration to see how this could support your operations, get in touch. hashtag #TeamUAV hashtag #PDG hashtag #Dock3 hashtag #DJI

articles.snippet: 🚁 Automating Wind & Solar Inspections with DJI Dock 3 As the renewable energy sector continues to expand, traditional inspection methods are struggling to keep pace with the scale, complexity, and safety requirements of modern wind and solar assets. In our latest article, we explore how GÜRİŞ transformed its inspection workflows by deploying DJI Dock 3, moving from manual, high-risk inspections to a fully automated drone-based operation. 🔹 Inspection timelines reduced from 4-12 weeks to just 1-3 days 🔹 Early detection of critical wind turbine blade defects 🔹 Accurate solar hotspot identification and improved energy output 🔹 Enhanced safety through remote, autonomous operations 🔹 Consistent, standardized data for smarter asset management This real-world deployment demonstrates how autonomous drone systems are reshaping renewable energy operations—delivering faster insights, higher safety standards, and measurable performance gains. articles.title: Really hard to make good user-flow, user story for the problem statement for Drone Docking station. But after all...Now I'm very excited to
articles.snippet: Really hard to make good user-flow, user story for the problem statement for Drone Docking station. But after all...Now I'm very excited to share "Dock" — a web application designed to manage autonomous drone operations across smart cities! From scheduling patrols to real-time threat detection and docking station management, Dock ensures smooth, responsive, and AI-driven security monitoring. articles.title: Transforming Highway Management with Drones. Highways face challenges like speeding, illegal parking, and slow incident response. In China’s
articles.snippet: Transforming Highway Management with Drones. Highways face challenges like speeding, illegal parking, and slow incident response. articles.snippet: 🚨 DJI Dock 3 with Matrice 4TD: 24/7 Autonomous Surveillance, No Pilots Required 🚁 A new era of unmanned monitoring is here. The DJI Dock 3 paired with the Matrice 4TD delivers an all-in-one drone-in-a-box solution for critical infrastructure, public safety, and industrial operations. 🔹 Fully automated operations – launch, land, and recharge with no human intervention 🔹 Smart Track – detect and follow people, vehicles, or vessels 🔹 Intelligent Change Detection – compare area changes over time 🔹 Weatherproof & field-ready – IP56-rated, operates from –30°C to +50°C 🔹 Managed via FlightHub 2 – mission planning, live feed, and team coordination 🌍 Ideal for: 🔹 Border Security 🔹 Utility Monitoring 🔹 Emergency Response 🔹 Environmental Surveillance 📩 Ready to integrate DJI Dock 3 into your operations? articles.title: The DJI Dock is now the 5th most popular drone on DroneDeploy, with usage doubling over the last 3 months . Docked Drones are the best way t
articles.snippet: The DJI Dock is now the 5th most popular drone on DroneDeploy, with usage doubling over the last 3 months . Docked Drones are the best way to Capture the Reality of your job sites 🔹 Simplest to Operate: Fully autonomous deployment it. 🔹 Most Secure: 100% fire-walled for maximum data security (with DD-firewall) 🔹 Most Accurate: Precision positioning with local RTK base. 🔹 DroneDeploy Dock is the best software for it: DroneDeploy Dock Flight includes chained flight for productivity, 8 different flight types, and more to come every quarter (https://lnkd.in/eJ5Mjctt)! Yes, it’s a more premium investment (Dock 3 starts at $35k) but aligns to other premium systems like the FreeFly Astro and Skydio drones (their own dock looks great!). Like everything - start small, scale fast. Test the ROI with 1-2 docks and watch your operations 3x for less effort.

articles.snippet: The DJI Dock 3 is the next step in drone capabilities and automation. We completed a remote demo setup with the Dock 3 and the Matrice 4TD, and it is clear how much value this system brings to organizations that depend on fast accurate and repeatable data. Dock based operations give clients a scalable path to 24 hour coverage without the cost and coordination of sending crews to the field.
